info.name: Calendax API
info.description: Complete API collection for Calendax multi-tenant server

request.description: Login as super admin. Saves accessToken to {{adminToken}} variable.
Creates a new tenant and provisions its database. The tenant slug becomes the x-tenant-id for subsequent requests.

item.name: Tenant - Auth

request.description: Tenant user login. Saves accessToken to {{tenantToken}}.

item.description: All tenant routes require the x-tenant-id header set to the tenant slug.

request.description: OtpPurpose enum values: email_verification, password_reset, etc.

variable.description: JWT token for admin (set after admin login)
JWT token for tenant user (set after tenant login)
Tenant slug/ID used in x-tenant-id header
